segments.text: Lesson 129–70 Miles an Hour.

translations.zh-Hans: 第129课——时速70英里。

segments.text: Listen to the tape, then answer this question.

translations.zh-Hans: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

segments.text: What does Anne advise her husband to do next time?

translations.zh-Hans: 安建议她丈夫下次怎么做？

segments.text: Look, Gary, that policeman's waving to you.

translations.zh-Hans: 看，加里，那个警察在向你挥手。

segments.text: He wants you to stop.

translations.zh-Hans: 他要你停车。

segments.text: Where do you think you are?

translations.zh-Hans: 你以为你这是在哪儿？

segments.text: On a racetrack?

translations.zh-Hans: 在赛车场吗？

segments.text: You must have been driving at seventy miles an hour.

translations.zh-Hans: 你刚才的车速一定达到了每小时70英里。

segments.text: I can't have been.

translations.zh-Hans: 不可能。

segments.text: I was doing eighty when I overtook you.

translations.zh-Hans: 我以每小时80英里的速度超过了你。

segments.text: Didn't you see the speed limit?

translations.zh-Hans: 你没看见限速标志吗？

segments.text: I'm afraid I didn't, officer.

translations.zh-Hans: 恐怕没看见，警官。

segments.text: I must have been dreaming.

translations.zh-Hans: 我刚才一定是在开小差。

segments.text: He wasn't dreaming, officer.

translations.zh-Hans: 警官，他可没有开小差。

segments.text: I was telling him to drive slowly.

translations.zh-Hans: 我一直在叫他开慢点。

segments.text: That's why I didn't see the sign.

translations.zh-Hans: 所以我才没看见那个标志。

segments.text: Let me see your driving license.

translations.zh-Hans: 让我看看你的驾驶执照。

segments.text: I won't charge you this time, but you'd better not do it again.

translations.zh-Hans: 这次我不罚你，但你最好别再犯了。

segments.text: Thank you.

translations.zh-Hans: 谢谢您。

segments.text: I'll certainly be more careful.

translations.zh-Hans: 我以后一定会更加小心。

segments.text: I told you to drive slowly, Gary.

translations.zh-Hans: 我早就叫你开慢点了，加里。

segments.text: You always tell me to drive slowly, darling.

translations.zh-Hans: 亲爱的，你总是叫我开慢点。

segments.text: Well, next time, you'd better take my advice.

translations.zh-Hans: 那下次你最好听我的劝。
